moat_analysis.details: Mixed ROIC: >15% in only 3/10 periods; Insufficient gross margin data; Moderate capital requirements: Avg capex 6.2% of revenue; Invests in R&D, building intellectual property

management_analysis.details: Good cash conversion: FCF/NI ratio of 1.02; Missing debt or equity data; Low cash reserves: Cash/Revenue ratio of 0.04; No insider trading data available; Stable share count: Limited dilution

predictability_analysis.details: Moderately predictable revenue: 3.8% avg growth with some volatility; Insufficient operating income history; Insufficient margin history; Highly predictable cash generation: Positive FCF in all periods

valuation_analysis.details: Good value: 5.1% FCF yield; Expensive: 23.7% premium to reasonable value; Declining FCF trend is concerning
